Title: Bacterial colony size growth estimation by deep learning
Authors: Nagy, Sára Ágnes; Makrai, László; Csabai, István; Tőzsér, Dóra; Szita, Géza; Solymosi, Norbert
Quote: CNN-based bacterial colony detection and the subsequent analysis of bacterial colony growth dynamics might become an accurate and efficient tool for bacteriological work and research.

Title: Annotated dataset for deep-learning-based bacterial colony detection
Authors: Makrai, László; Fodróczy, Bettina; Nagy, Sára Ágnes; Czeiszing, Péter; Csabai, István; Szita, Géza; Solymosi, Norbert
Quote: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are probably the most efficient tools in this field, and there are efforts to use CNNs to automate colony counting.

Title: Machine Learning-Based Prediction of Microbial Growth and Acidification in Yogurt Fermentation at Industrial Temperatures
Quote: Hybrid LSTM–SVR modeling accurately predicts microbial growth and acidification in yogurt fermentation, with prediction errors reduced by up to 86% versus traditional kinetic models across industrial temperatures.
